title: Bhojeshwar Temple
tagline: Bhojeshwar Temple — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: The Bhojeshwar Temple (IAST: Bhojeśvara) is an incomplete Hindu temple in Bhojpur village of Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: The Bhojeshwar Temple (IAST: Bhojeśvara) is an incomplete Hindu temple in Bhojpur village of Madhya Pradesh, India. Dedicated to Shiva, it houses a 7.5-foot (2.3 m) high lingam in its sanctum. The temple's construction is believed to have started in the 11th century, during the reign of the Paramara king Bhoja. The construction was abandoned for unknown reasons, with the architectural plans engraved on the surrounding rocks.

topPlaces.description: Bhojpur is a town of historical and religious importance in Raisen District of Madhya Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Mandideep
topPlaces.description: Mandideep is a town with municipality in Goharganj sub-district of Raisen district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. Mandideep is 23 km from Bhopal and is basically an Industrial township which came into existence in late 1970s.

topPlaces.name: Bangrasia
topPlaces.description: Bangrasia is a village in the Bhopal district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is located in the Huzur tehsil and the Phanda block.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhojeshwar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhojeshwar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhojeshwar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhojeshwar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhojeshwar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhojeshwar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhojeshwar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhojeshwar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhojpur, Madhya Pradesh, Mandideep, Bangrasia, Pipaliya Kunjadgarh, Deepdi.
